/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libobject_search_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libobject_search_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/object_search_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/object_search_msgs/msg/detail/object_mask_with_tf__description.c.o CMakeFiles/object_search_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/object_search_msgs/msg/detail/object_mask_with_tf__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/object_search_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/object_search_msgs/msg/detail/object_mask_with_tf__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libtf2_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
